action.description:
Introduced by Representatives McCarville, Brown, DeSanto, Subeck, Sinicki, Ortiz-Velez, Hysell, Andraca, Roe, Miresse, Taylor, Kirsch, Hong, Bare, Udell, Anderson, Joers, Tenorio and Snodgrass; 
cosponsored by Senators Ratcliff, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Roys, Hesselbein, Larson and Spreitzer
